sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
The **ClickUp connector** integrates with ClickUp workspaces via the ClickUp API v2 using a **Personal API Token** (api_key auth). It enables Shielva to sync tasks and lists across all authorized ClickUp workspaces.

**Key capabilities:**
- Sync all workspaces (teams), spaces, folders, lists, and tasks
- Full task content including status, priority, assignees, tags, and description
- Page-based task pagination to handle large workspaces
- Stable document IDs via `sha256('<type>:<id>')[:16]` for deduplication across syncs
- Retry with exponential backoff on transient errors (skips retry on auth failures)

children.title: Connector Type
children.content: `clickup` — registered in ACP as **ClickUp**.

children.title: Provider
children.content: ClickUp — API v2 base URL: `https://api.clickup.com/api/v2/`

children.title: Supported Operations
children.content:
| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `install()` | Validates api_key via `GET /user`; returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE/error |
| `health_check()` | Calls `GET /user`; returns username/email in message |
| `sync()` | Hierarchical walk: teams → spaces → folders → lists → tasks (page-based pagination) |
| `list_teams()` | Returns all authorized ClickUp workspaces (teams) |
| `list_spaces(team_id)` | Returns all spaces in a workspace |
| `list_folders(space_id)` | Returns all folders in a space |
| `list_lists(space_id, folder_id)` | Returns lists in a space or folder |
| `list_tasks(list_id, include_closed)` | Returns all tasks in a list (auto-paginates) |
| `get_task(task_id)` | Returns a single task by ID |

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content: The connector uses a **Personal API Token** for authentication. The token is sent as the raw value of the `Authorization` header — no `Bearer` prefix.

children.title: Auth Type
children.content: `api_key` — generate at ClickUp Settings → Apps → API Token → Generate.

children.title: Authorization Header
children.content:
```
Authorization: pk_abc123...
```
ClickUp Personal API Tokens start with `pk_`. The header value is the raw token — no `Bearer ` prefix.

children.title: Install Fields
children.content:
| Field | Key | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| Personal API Token | `api_key` | password | Yes | ClickUp Personal API Token (starts with `pk_`) |

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content: Pass the token in the connector `config` dict:

children.title: Config Example
children.content:
```python
from connector import ClickUpConnector

conn = ClickUpConnector(
    tenant_id="Tenant-abc123",
    connector_id="conn_clickup_001",
    config={"api_key": "pk_your_token_here"},
)
```

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content: HTTP client methods map directly to ClickUp API v2 endpoints.

children.title: get_authorized_user()
children.content:
`GET /user` — Retrieves the authenticated user. Used by `install()` and `health_check()`.

Returns: `{"user": {"id": ..., "username": ..., "email": ...}}`

children.title: get_teams()
children.content:
`GET /team` — Lists all authorized workspaces.

Returns: `{"teams": [{"id": ..., "name": ...}, ...]}`

children.title: get_spaces(team_id) / get_space(space_id)
children.content:
`GET /team/{team_id}/space?archived=false` — Lists spaces in a workspace.
`GET /space/{space_id}` — Retrieves a single space.

children.title: get_folders(space_id)
children.content: `GET /space/{space_id}/folder?archived=false` — Lists folders in a space.

children.title: get_lists(space_id, folder_id)
children.content:
`GET /folder/{folder_id}/list` — Lists in a folder.
`GET /space/{space_id}/list` — Folderless lists in a space.

Exactly one of `space_id` or `folder_id` must be provided.

children.title: get_tasks(list_id, page, archived, include_closed)
children.content:
`GET /list/{list_id}/task?page={page}&archived={bool}&include_closed={bool}`

Pagination: page-based (`?page=0`, `?page=1`, …). Stop when `tasks` is empty or `last_page: true`.

children.title: get_task(task_id)
children.content: `GET /task/{task_id}` — Retrieves a single task by ID.

children.title: get_members(list_id)
children.content: `GET /list/{list_id}/member` — Lists members of a list.

sections.title: Data Model
sections.content: All ClickUp resources are normalized into `ConnectorDocument` with stable IDs.

children.title: Stable ID Scheme
children.content:
| Resource | Stable ID formula |
|----------|-------------------|
| Task | `sha256('task:' + task_id)[:16]` |
| List | `sha256('list:' + list_id)[:16]` |

children.title: Document Types
children.content:
| Type string | Resource | Source |
|-------------|----------|--------|
| `task` | Task from any list | `clickup` |
| `task_list` | Task list (inside folder or folderless) | `clickup` |

children.title: Task Fields Synced
children.content: name, description, status, priority, list_id, list_name, space_id, folder_name, url, date_created, date_updated, assignees (usernames), tags

children.title: List Fields Synced
children.content: name, folder_name, space_id, space_name, archived, task_count, due_date

sections.title: Exceptions
sections.content: The connector uses a typed exception hierarchy.

children.title: Exception Types
children.content:
| Exception | Trigger | Retried? | Fields |
|-----------|---------|----------|--------|
| `ClickUpError` | Base — any API error | Yes | `message`, `status_code`, `code` |
| `ClickUpAuthError` | 401, 403 | No | inherits base |
| `ClickUpNotFoundError` | 404 | No | `resource`, `resource_id` |
| `ClickUpRateLimitError` | 429 | Yes | `retry_after` |
| `ClickUpNetworkError` | Connection error, timeout, 5xx | Yes | inherits base |

children.title: Common Errors
children.content:
| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
|---------|-------|-----|
| `install` returns OFFLINE / invalid_credentials | Wrong or expired API token | Regenerate at ClickUp Settings → Apps |
| `health_check` returns DEGRADED | Network error or API downtime | Check status.clickup.com |
| Tasks missing from sync | Private space | Ensure the token owner has access |
| Rate limit errors (429) | Too many API calls | Connector retries automatically — reduce sync frequency |
| `sync` returns 0 documents | No tasks in workspace | Confirm lists have tasks in ClickUp |
